title: Better combat and Spartan Weaponry: Ice and Fire
description: datapack for compatibility between better combat and spartan and weaponry: ice and fire, your welcome
body:
Hi! This is a little datapack I made in my spare time, feel free to use, share and modify it, I made it for anyone who is interested

This will be necessary, the spartan weaponry:ice and fire mod and the bettercombat mod
load your world with this datapack and enjoy
